calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-01-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der for Debra Dolch.

The Court stated that the only issue was whether the statutory fees adequately compensate the Administrator. Mr. Der stated that there will still be a Supplemental Accounting in order to get the bond discharged, a Petition for Final Discharge, a property tax assessment, that there are some things that are undone in the Estate and that the Administrator anticipates that she will spend 15 to 20 more hours. The accounting petition was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Benton.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Oct-09-2012 Continued To Oct-23-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-25-2012 Continued To Oct-09-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (135 Dellbrook Avenue)
Off Calendar Apr-02-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der for and with Debra Dolch.

Bid is increased to $627,000.00. The sale was confirmed based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). An additional bond in the amount of $433,000.00 is required.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-14-2011 Granted Per Written Order
